issues.claim: continuity-of-engagement could be claimed for any senior verse
issues.objection: The framing has potential to leak to verses about steady-mind (2.55-2.58) or yoked-state (6.18). However the specific anchor — sarva-bhuta-sthitam (residing in all beings) maps to engagement uniform across every layer of the system the senior touches, which is verse-specific to 6.31.

notes: BG 6.31's engineering analog is anchored on the verse's load-bearing word sarva-bhuta-sthitam. Other meditation verses (6.18, 6.19) anchor on different terms (yukta, dipah nivatasthah). PASS.
